# /expand

**This workflow's full definition lives in [`../agents/expand.agent.md`](../agents/expand.agent.md)** — the single source of truth, shared with the GitHub Copilot CLI. Read that file in full and execute it exactly, treating anything typed after the command as `$ARGUMENTS`.
